overview: Codestral Mamba is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Specialist open models (Mathstral / Codestral Mamba) line. Released 2024-07-16. One-off open-weight research models for math and efficient long-context code.
What's notable in this version: Mamba-architecture code model for efficient long-context inference (open-codestral-mamba).
